# LuxAed

> Aedade ja väravate tootmine ja paigaldus Tallinnas ja Harjumaal. Заборы, ворота и калитки под ключ в Таллинне и Харьюмаа. Fences, gates and wickets in Tallinn and Harju County, Estonia. Puit, profiilplekk, keevispaneel (3D), väravaautomaatika ja domofonid. Üle 15 aasta kogemust, tasuta mõõdistus, 100% soovitab (34 arvustust Facebookis).

## Main pages
- [Avaleht — Eesti (ET)](https://luxaed.ee/)
- [Главная — Русский (RU)](https://luxaed.ee/ru/)
- [Home — English (EN)](https://luxaed.ee/en/)
- [Meist / О компании / About](https://luxaed.ee/meist/)
- [KKK / Вопросы / FAQ](https://luxaed.ee/kkk/)

## Services
- Puitaiad / Деревянные заборы / Wooden fences: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/puitaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/derevyannye-zabory/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/wooden-fence/)
- Metallaed, profiilplekk / Профнастил / Corrugated metal: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/metallaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/profnastil/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/metal-fence/)
- Metall-lippaed / Штакетник / Steel picket: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/lippaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/shtaketnik/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/steel-picket/)
- Võrkaed, 3D paneelaed / 3D-сетка / Mesh & 3D panel: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aiad/vorkaed/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/setka-3d/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/mesh-fence/)
- Väravad ja automaatika / Ворота и автоматика / Gates & automation: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/varavad/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/vorota-kalitki/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/gates-automation/)
- Aia remont / Ремонт заборов / Fence repair: [ET](https://luxaed.ee/aia-remont/) · [RU](https://luxaed.ee/ru/uslugi/remont-zaborov/) · [EN](https://luxaed.ee/en/services/fence-repair/)

## About
- Master craftsman: Artur Mustafin, 15+ years building fences and gates.
- Turnkey: free on-site measurement, materials, installation, exact price up front, no hidden fees.
- Works year-round across Tallinn and all of Harju County.

## Contact
- Phone: +372 5695 8285
- Email: luxaed9@gmail.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LuxxAed
- Area: Tallinn, Harjumaa, Estonia
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00, Sat by appointment
